title: Go! Princess Pretty Cure: Go! Go!! Gouka Sanbon Date!!!
original_title: 映画 Go!プリンセスプリキュア Go!Go!!豪華3本立て!!!
overview: Go! Princess Pretty Cure: Go! Go!! Gorgeous Triple Feature!!! is the 12th Pretty Cure movie produced by Toei Animation.  The movie was released in Japanese cinemas on October 31, 2015. It consists of 3 features; A Precious Treasure of Pumpkin Land, Lefy's Wonderful Night, and Cure Flora and A Mysterious Mirror.
